notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Tommy Edman reaches on a throwing error by second baseman Luke Keaschall. Freddie Freeman scores. Tommy Edman to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Austin Martin. Alex Freeland scores.
